hero.mechanic: loss-aversion tease + honest public grade + soft trial ask
algoActions: photo_expand (full graded card screenshot shows the two site-only wins in the same list)
profile_click + follow (strangers audit the claim; every future pick tweet becomes an ad for the untweeted board)
repost/share (RT line: the feed/site profit-margin contrast)
hero.negativeSignalAudit: Self-deprecating about our own 2-2 feed; no gloating; the sell is one line framed as fact.
hero.continuity: Closes the noon-confession arc from 7/6; callback to Friday's Colombia max play; carries the week number forward without re-leading with it.
hero.screenshot: Graded July 6 full card — all seven results, the two site-only wins visible alongside the tweeted picks
hero.text:
Yesterday, honestly:

What I tweeted went 2-2. Spain ✅ and the Brewers ✅. The Astros and my Belgium experiment paid for the lesson.

What I didn't tweet is the part that matters:

The board's top-rated play of the night — Diamondbacks ML ✅
A quiet 4-unit Over 9.5 in Mets–Braves ✅

Both sat on the site all afternoon. Neither ever made it to this feed.

Full card: +5.7 units on the night. +27 since last Monday.

I tweet two or three plays a day. The board carries all of them — sized, timestamped, locked 15 minutes before start.

The first week is free. Yesterday, the difference between this feed and the site was the whole profit margin.
hero.rtLine: Yesterday, the difference between this feed and the site was the whole profit margin.
hero.selfReplyAt25min: Today's card is already up — Argentina at noon, Colombia (Friday's max-play team) at 4, plus the MLB slate tonight. nhlsavant.com/?ref=t0707a

hero.version: v3 FINAL — v1 happy-L rejected (not top-of-funnel), v2 rejected (claimed site-only picks were posted)

gradePosts.argentinaWin:
Argentina handles it. ✅ 4 units at -285 isn't glamorous — it's just green.

Colombia +125 at 4 PM is the fun one. Same Colombia that cashed Friday's max.
gradePosts.argentinaLoss:
Argentina ML dies at noon and takes 4 units with it. Heavy favorites lose too — that's why the board sizes them, not us.

Colombia +125 at 4. The day isn't over.

replyNotes: @BullishonSports asked 'Is spain chalked then??' yesterday 2:25 PM — unanswered; a quick reply is a free community touch
@kagerandle rode USA and won — if he appears in replies, engage warmly; he's a 799-follower repeat engager
doNotDo: Do not re-lead with the +54u/all-time number — week number (+27) is the fresh one
Do not blame anything for the Belgium loss — the happy-L is the brand moment
Re-run socialBoard before the noon Argentina post window if quoting consensus numbers
